stats.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

stats.name: goalAssists
stats.description: The number of assists.

stats.name: offsides
stats.description: The number of times a player or team gets caught offside.

stats.name: shotsOnTarget
stats.description: The number of shots that are on goal.

stats.name: totalGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored against the opposing team.

stats.name: totalShots
stats.description: The number of shots attempted.

articles.headline: USMNT's Gianluca Busio helps Venezia return to Serie A
articles.description: Venezia will be back in Italy's Serie A next season, after a 2-2 draw at Spezia on Friday secured promotion back to the top tier with a game to spare.

images.name: Busio Venezia celeb [1296x729]
images.caption: Gianluca Busio (right) celebrates Venezia's promotion alongside John Yeboah (left) and Ridgeciano Haps.
images.alt: John Yeboah of Venezia, Ridgeciano Haps of Venezia and Gianluca Busio of Venezia celebrates during the Serie B match between Spezia Calcio and Venezia FC at Stadio Alberto Picco on May 01, 2026 in La Spezia, Italy.

images.name: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Ashley Cole 'discouraged' by coaching opportunities in England
articles.description: Former Chelsea defender Ashley Cole has said he felt "discouraged" by the lack of managerial opportunities in England and is grateful for Serie B side Cesena for the "massive leap of faith" in appointing him.

images.name: Ashley Cole [1296x729]
images.caption: Ashley Cole is managing in Italy's second flight.

articles.headline: Ashley Cole wins first match in management as Cesena defeat Catanzaro
articles.description: Ashley Cole has won his first match as a senior professional football manager as Serie B side Cesena defeated Catanzaro 3-1.

images.name: Ashley Cole [1296x729]
images.caption: Ashley Cole won his first match in management with Cesena.
images.alt: Ashley Cole of Cesena coach in the bench during the Serie B match between Mantova 1911 SSD and AC Cesena at Stadio Danilo Martelli on March 17, 2026 in Mantova, Italy.

articles.headline: Ashley Cole named head coach of Italian Serie B side Cesena
articles.description: Former England and Chelsea defender Ashley Cole has been appointed head coach of Serie B club Cesena.

images.name: Ashley Cole [1296x729]
images.caption: Ashley Cole has been named as head coach of Serie B side Cesena.

images.name: Why Chelsea's loss vs. Newcastle is a 'huge blow' for UCL hopes
images.caption: Steve Nicol reacts to Chelsea's 1-0 loss to Newcastle in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Galliani, Berlusconi family exit Monza as U.S. takeover confirmed
articles.description: Adriano Galliani is leaving his boyhood club Monza after American fund Beckett Layne Ventures completed their purchase from the Berlusconi family on Thursday.

images.name: Adriano Galliani Monza 2025 [1296x729]
images.caption: Adriano Galliani said he turned down an offer to becomes Monza's president.
images.alt: Adriano Galliani is present during the AS Roma against AC Monza match, Serie A, at Stadio Olimpico in Rome, Italy, on February 24, 2025.

articles.headline: Reijnders brace sees Man City ease past Palermo in preseason tie
articles.description: A Tijjani Reijnders brace and an Erling Haaland goal saw Manchester City defeat Palermo 3-0 in their final preseason match.

images.name: Tijjani Reijnders of Manchester City FC celebrates after scoring his team's second goal during Pre-Season Friendly match between Palermo FC and Machester City FC at Stadio Renzo Barbera on August 09, 2025 in Palermo, Italy. [1296x729]
images.alt: Tijjani Reijnders of Manchester City FC celebrates after scoring his team's second goal during Pre-Season Friendly match between Palermo FC and Machester City FC at Stadio Renzo Barbera on August 09, 2025 in Palermo, Italy.

images.name: What does Trafford's return to Man City mean for Ederson?
images.caption: Julien Laurens talks about James Trafford's transfer to Manchester City after rejoining the club from Championship runners-up Burnley.
